(async) updateSecret(id, key, secret) → {ConsumerKey}

Update the secret for an LTI consumer
Parameters:
Name Type Default Description
id number the ID of the consumer
key string | null null the new key for the consumer (if null, a new key will be generated)
secret string | null null the new secret for the consumer (if null, a new secret will be generated)

  • controllers/consumer.js, line 183
Returns:
the updated consumer key
